VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists at arXiv:2503.16419 with the exact title and is authored by Yang Sui, Yu-Neng Chuang, Guanchu Wang, Jiamu Zhang, Tianyi Zhang, Jiayi Yuan, Hongyi Liu, Andrew Wen, Shaochen Zhong, Hanjie Chen, and Xia Hu. The cited author "Na Zou" does not appear in the real author list, but all other cited authors (1–9) match exactly — this is a minor discrepancy in an "et al." citation, not a fabrication.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.16419
